current_state: OAuth 2.0 + PKCE dashboard authentication is mid-implementation, with encrypted session middleware wired into guarded dashboard routes and integration test scaffolding in place, awaiting session-expiry test cases and full-suite verification.
completed_work: Decision adopted to use OAuth 2.0 with PKCE; initial handoff recorded from agent:A to agent:B; OAuth callback handler scoped; encrypted session middleware implemented and integrated into dashboard route guards; integration test scaffolding for cookie validation and unauthenticated-redirect scenarios established.
rejected_stale_work: None recorded in the current memory snapshot — no prior attempts have been rejected or superseded, though the handoff (revision 1) predates the middleware and test-scaffolding work, so it should be treated as a baseline rather than the current state.
next_implementation_step: Write the session-expiry integration test cases (expired session cookie and missing session cookie) against the guarded dashboard routes, then run the full integration suite to confirm each guard redirects unauthenticated requests and rejects expired cookies.
